items.title: Enhance Click Functionality with Normalized Coordinates in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new generic `browser.click_at` function that utilizes normalized viewport coordinates ranging from 0 to 1000. It includes strict guards against out-of-range inputs and ensures security by rejecting invalid targets. The extension version has been updated to 0.6.9, and extensive validation has been performed to ensure robustness.

items.title: Enhanced Browser Click Functionality in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new `click_at` capability for the browser, allowing clicks at normalized viewport coordinates ranging from 0 to 1000. The feature is only exposed when a Skill explicitly declares the `click_at` capability, ensuring controlled usage. All related tests have passed successfully, paving the way for a more interactive browser experience.

items.title: Enhance Browser Device with Click Capability in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces the `click_at` capability for BrowserDevice, allowing for more precise interactions. It ensures that `browser.click_at` is authorized only when necessary, improving security and functionality. Additionally, older devices that only support coarse `trusted_input` will now fail selection, enhancing overall compatibility.

items.title: Enhance Suno Voice Persona Workflow in Platform Service 🎤
items.summary: This update implements a native two-phase workflow for the Suno voice persona within the MountSea worker. Key changes include the removal of the previous OpenAI-HK proxy, the introduction of a Fish voice model training process, and the enforcement of a 30-second completion window for task recovery. Additionally, focused tests for Suno have been added to ensure reliability in production.

items.title: Streamlined OpenAI-HK Voice Integration in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update removes outdated workarounds for the MountSea voice integration, including unnecessary retries and associated tests. Key changes include the deletion of the offline account retry mechanism and the cleanup of related Docker scripts. The existing verification phrase retry and essential task-write guards remain intact, ensuring system stability.

items.title: Exciting New HappyHorse Video Generation Worker in Platform Service 🎥
items.summary: We've introduced a new worker for Alibaba Cloud Model Studio, specifically for HappyHorse video generation. This feature includes a single endpoint for multiple video generation variants, strict validation, and a robust error handling mechanism. The deployment is set up with Docker and Kubernetes, ensuring scalability and reliability.

items.title: Enhance Nano Banana Response Handling in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the handling of unfinished Nano Banana responses by labeling them with pending semantics instead of failure messages. The error-only legacy responses will still prioritize failure states, while the success rendering logic remains unchanged. Comprehensive tests have been added to ensure functionality.

items.title: Improve Pika task state labels and handling in Nexior 🚦
items.summary: This update refines the display of Pika task waiting states by showing 'Pending' when there is no response and 'Processing' during incomplete responses. It ensures that tasks with empty data still render their cards instead of disappearing silently. Additionally, failure states like failed, cancelled, and error now take precedence, allowing media playback to transition tasks into a success state. Comprehensive tests and linting confirm the changes are clean and stable.

items.title: Enhance Native Control Prioritization in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update prioritizes native browser controls over explicit controls and pointer containers, ensuring that essential buttons are named correctly before large containers consume text space. The extension has been upgraded to version 0.6.8, with successful validation across multiple tests confirming the changes. This enhancement improves user interaction by making critical functions more accessible.

items.title: Enhance Wan Task States Display in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the labeling of Wan task states, ensuring that queued, pending, processing, and running tasks are displayed correctly. The success state is now only shown when tasks are not in a waiting or failure state. Additionally, comprehensive tests have been added to validate these changes.

items.title: Enhance Kling Task States in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the handling of Kling task states by clearly displaying 'Pending' and 'Processing' statuses for unfinished video tasks. Additionally, it ensures that failure states take precedence over success states, preventing overlap. The changes have been validated with comprehensive tests and code reviews.

items.title: Enhance Sora Task Labels for Clarity in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the labeling of Sora task states by clearly distinguishing between 'Pending' and 'Processing' statuses. The waiting branch now uses a time icon instead of a warning icon, enhancing user experience. Additionally, tests have been added to ensure the new labeling semantics function correctly.

items.title: Enhance Luma Task Labels for Clarity in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the labeling of Luma tasks by displaying 'Pending' when there is no response and 'Processing' for pending or processing states. The waiting branch now uses a time icon instead of a warning icon, aligning with the existing alert structure in video scenarios. These changes enhance user understanding of task statuses.

items.title: Enhance Veo Task Metadata Coverage in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update adds coverage for Veo task metadata states, specifically for pending, success, and failure scenarios. Key changes include modifications to the Preview test file and the addition of a new JSON file for patch details. The implementation ensures compatibility with legacy action inference and maintains UI consistency across various scenarios.

items.title: Update Kimi README to Reflect OpenAPI Defaults in Clis 🚀
items.summary: The Kimi README has been updated to align with the current OpenAPI defaults, specifically marking `kimi-k3` as the default model. The changes include an updated reference for the `chat` option and a revised models table. This ensures that user-facing documentation is consistent with the latest implementation without altering any CLI behavior.

items.title: Enhance Interactive Control Prioritization in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the handling of interactive controls by scanning up to 10,000 DOM elements while maintaining a 2,000 semantic-candidate cap. It ensures that interactive controls are emitted before ordinary content, preserving critical submit buttons. The extension has been updated to version 0.6.7, with all tests passing and no vulnerabilities found.

items.title: Launch of Comprehensive Distribution Manual in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces the first two articles of a structured 'Earning Manual' focused on distribution strategies. Key additions include an overview of three earning paths and an introduction to the white-label Studio feature, both written in alignment with existing documentation. These resources aim to provide clear, factual guidance for users looking to leverage AI for income generation.

items.title: Boost WCDB Warmup Timeout for Larger Accounts in Wisdom 🚀
items.summary: This update extends the warmup timeout for the WCDB from 60 seconds to 900 seconds, ensuring that contacts, conversations, moments, and message samples can complete on larger accounts. The total legacy prepare budget remains bounded, maintaining the startup and warmup duration at 1800 seconds. Key tests have been modified to reflect this change and confirm the new timeout settings.

items.title: Enhance Screenshot Handling in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the handling of JPEG screenshot data URLs by decoding them locally, eliminating the need for a fetch call in the MV3 background. It also includes stricter validation to reject non-JPEG and malformed base64 sources, along with the addition of byte-exact parser tests. The extension has been updated to version 0.6.6, ensuring a more reliable user experience.

items.title: Enhance Semantic Click Targets in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update exposes roleless keyboard-focusable controls and cursor-pointer elements as semantic buttons, improving accessibility. It also addresses issues with nested pointer targets and ensures that editable content does not leak text. The extension version has been updated to 0.6.5, enhancing the overall functionality and user experience.

items.title: Enhance OpenAI-HK Retry Logic in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a retry mechanism for the OpenAI-HK Suno persona account when encountering a specific offline error. It limits retries to artist consistency requests and ensures that other error types do not trigger retries. Additionally, a regression test suite has been added to the Docker production build to maintain reliability.

items.title: Enhance aichat and kimi CLI Tools with Latest Updates in Clis 🚀
items.summary: This update synchronizes the `aichat` and `kimi` CLI tools with the latest OpenAPI specifications from AceDataCloud/Docs. Key changes include the addition of new commands for `aichat2` and updates to the default model for `kimi`, enhancing user experience and functionality. The changes also include new model listings and improved command options for better interaction.

items.title: Enhance NanoBanana Agent Skill Alignment in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update advances the NanoBanana Agent Skill to align with the latest merged commit from AceDataCloud/Skills. Key changes include updating the skills revision and ensuring service-level and artifact-level immutability. Validation confirms that all agent service sources compile successfully and focused tests have passed.

items.title: Enhance Suno Result Management in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update makes MountSea Suno clip normalization idempotent for already-normalized OpenAI-HK results and preserves raw prompt semantics. It also suppresses unnecessary cache writes during execution and extends AST ownership coverage across various media types. The changes improve efficiency and reliability in voice creation tasks.

items.title: Enhance WCDB Startup and Warmup Separation in Wisdom 🚀
items.summary: This update splits the WCDB preparation into distinct startup and bounded warmup phases, improving clarity and performance. It also ensures that legacy prepare RPC timeouts accommodate both phases and isolates decrypted WCDB temp files per worker, enhancing security. Cleanup processes have been refined to prevent leaks of plaintext files during timeouts or closures.

items.title: Enhance Kimi Documentation and Model Updates in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update adds the missing `kimi-k2.6` model entry and enhances the AI Chat V2 OpenAPI enum contract. It recommends `kimi-k3` across various client integration guides and replaces outdated examples with real production responses. Additionally, the authoritative K3 contract is documented, ensuring clarity on reasoning capabilities.

items.title: Enhance Airwallex Account Counting in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a provider-side baseline for existing Airwallex accounts to improve capacity checks. The production baseline is set to 5, aligning with the current provider account count, and ensures accurate quota usage by counting both baseline and recent local reservations. Additionally, negative configurations are clamped to zero, with documentation provided for manual updates.

items.title: Streamline Airwallex Sandbox Simulation in Index 🚀
items.summary: This update removes reference requirements from the Airwallex Demo deposit simulation, lowering the default simulation amount to $5. It introduces a mandatory `--confirm-simulate` flag for state mutations and adds eight safety tests to enhance contract integrity. Production account creation remains disabled to ensure security.

items.title: Update NanoBanana MCP Endpoint for Accuracy in Skills 🚀
items.summary: The NanoBanana hosted MCP endpoint has been corrected to the accurate hostname, enhancing reliability. Key updates were made to the canonical Skill, shared MCP catalog, and repository catalog. All relevant unit tests and frontmatter files have been validated successfully, ensuring a smooth transition to the new endpoint.

items.title: Streamline OAuth with CLIProxyAPI in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update replaces the custom Node Claude OAuth relay with the pinned CLIProxyAPI v7.2.89, ensuring compatibility with existing endpoints like `/v1/messages` and `/v1/chat/completions`. The new implementation requires only Anthropic-issued Claude `setup-token` credentials and enhances security by managing authentication files more effectively. Key changes include disabling cloak mode and ensuring stateless replicas to prevent refresh-token rotation issues.

items.title: Enhance Sidebar Navigation for Full Width Highlight in Frontend Web 🎨
items.summary: This update fixes the sidebar navigation by ensuring that each row extends fully to the right edge, eliminating unwanted whitespace. Key changes include adjusting widths and paddings in the CSS to achieve a seamless hover and active state experience. The modifications enhance the visual consistency across both desktop and mobile views.

items.title: Kimi CLI Sync Check Complete in Clis 🚀
items.summary: This update confirms that the Kimi CLI is fully aligned with the latest documentation updates. Key checks included verifying endpoint paths, model choices, and handling of `reasoning_effort`, all of which matched the current API contract. No changes to commands, options, or endpoints were necessary, ensuring a seamless integration.

items.title: Streamline Agent Guide with New Manifest in Index 🚀
items.summary: This update renames the canonical agent guide plan and consolidates the documentation into a single, production-verified entry. The previous dual-schema rollout has been replaced with a streamlined architecture, and historical documents have been archived for reference. Key changes enhance clarity and maintainability of the agent integration documentation.

items.title: Enhance Kimi Documentation with Official References in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update adds an Official References section to the Kimi Chat Completions developer guide, linking to key Moonshot resources. Additionally, the same traceable sources are now included in the Kimi service-page FAQ. All links have been verified for accessibility and proper formatting.

items.title: Align `reasoning_effort` to Max Only in Clis 🚀
items.summary: This update synchronizes the `kimi` CLI with the latest OpenAPI changes, restricting the `--reasoning-effort` option to 'max' only. The command help text and user-facing documentation have been updated accordingly to reflect this change. Additionally, tests have been adjusted to reject any legacy values that are no longer supported.

items.title: Enhance Suno Voice Account Retry Logic in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a retry mechanism for Suno voice creation when the selected upstream account is not age-eligible. The existing 115-second deadline and 55-second minimum retry budget are preserved, while definitive audio errors remain non-retryable. Additionally, Prettier has been applied to the OpenAI-HK source files to resolve linting issues.

items.title: Expanded LLM Model Release Checklist in Index 🚀
items.summary: The LLM model release checklist has been significantly expanded from 8 to 16 comprehensive steps, enhancing the process for various surfaces. Key additions include a new independent models catalog, Mongo checker routing, and updated fallback policies. The documentation now emphasizes that generated files must not be edited directly, ensuring consistency and accuracy.

items.title: Exciting Updates: Kimi K3 and K2.6 Added in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces Kimi K3 and K2.6 to the Nexior chat model picker, enhancing user experience with improved model capabilities. K3 is now prioritized in the model list and features expanded reasoning, vision, and file support. Additionally, localization updates have been made across 17 languages, ensuring consistent messaging and removing outdated references.

items.title: Enhance Kimi API Documentation in A P Is 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the Kimi API README and integration guide by recommending the Kimi K3 model. Key changes include detailed documentation on reasoning, vision, and tool calling capabilities, along with updated request examples. Historical K2.5 snapshots are preserved for reference, ensuring clarity for users transitioning to K3.

items.title: Enhance AI Chat Models with Kimi K3 in Skills 🚀
items.summary: This update adds the `kimi-k3` and `kimi-k2.6` models to the canonical AI chat skill model table, positioning K3 as Moonshot's flagship model. The changes ensure that the model ordering and identifiers are consistent across the board, maintaining high standards for the skill's content. Validation checks confirm that all updates are clean and compliant.

items.title: Expose Kimi K3 Models in M C Ps 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces the `kimi-k3` and `kimi-k2.6` models to the AiChat V2 MCP public model. Additionally, a contract test has been added to ensure both model identifiers are correctly implemented. The changes have been validated with successful tests and code checks.

items.title: Streamline Kimi K3 Reasoning to Max Only in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update restricts the Kimi K3 `reasoning_effort` enum to the officially supported value: `max`. Claims regarding `standard` and `high` as usable tiers have been removed, ensuring clarity in documentation. The field remains optional, as omitted requests default to `max`, while compatibility warnings are added for other string inputs.

items.title: Enhance Extractor Self-Containment in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update makes the injected semantic page extractor self-contained following Chrome's function serialization. It includes a new detached VM execution test to ensure compliance with Chrome's no-module-closure boundary. Additionally, the extension has been upgraded to version 0.6.4, reflecting these improvements.

items.title: Dependency Updates Galore in x402 🚀
items.summary: This PR bumps several key dependencies in the x402 project, including updates to loguru, psycopg2-binary, web3, pydantic, solana, and uvicorn. These updates enhance performance, fix bugs, and ensure compatibility with the latest Python versions, ultimately improving the overall stability and functionality of the project.

items.title: Align Reasoning Effort Enum with OpenAPI in Clis 🚀
items.summary: This update synchronizes the `--reasoning-effort` enum in the Kimi CLI with the latest OpenAPI specifications, changing the allowed values to `standard`, `high`, and `max`. The command validation now utilizes a shared constant, and documentation has been updated accordingly. No changes were necessary for NanoBanana as it already matched the schema.

items.title: Unveiling the Poivelle AI Studio Design in Index 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces the Poivelle professional AI film-production workspace, allowing seamless collaboration between humans, CLI/SDK clients, and Skill Agents on a unified Project Graph. Key features include a comprehensive set of editing tools, workspace-scoped assets, and secure templates, all while maintaining a robust architecture for trust and concurrency. The changes are documented in the new RFC and have undergone thorough validation and review.

items.title: Enhance Suno Task Polling Precision in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update replaces the seconds-based sleep call in MountSea Suno polling with a millisecond-native setTimeout, improving polling accuracy. Regression guards have been added to ensure the millisecond timer is used correctly, preventing unsafe helper calls. The fix addresses a critical delay issue that caused significant timeouts in public requests.

items.title: Streamline Scenario Tab Styles in Nexior 🎨
items.summary: This update consolidates the baseline styles for scenario tabs across multiple components, including Fish, Kling, Midjourney, Producer, Suno, and Veo. It maintains specific behaviors for Kling and Veo while ensuring compatibility with nested tool tabs. The changes enhance the overall consistency and usability of the scenario tabs.

items.title: Optimize WCDB Preparation for Faster Warmup in Wisdom 🚀
items.summary: This update caps the WCDB preparation RPC timeout to 60 seconds, significantly reducing wait times. The warmup process is now limited to a more manageable set of contacts and conversations, while still allowing for optional and non-blocking message warmup when no conversations are available. These changes enhance performance and user experience.

items.title: Enhance Midjourney Task State Alignment in Nexior 🎨
items.summary: This update introduces consistent top-spacing for the Midjourney task state alerts, specifically for the imagine, videos, and describe states. It aligns the metadata rhythm for pending, success, and failure states, ensuring a uniform presentation. Additionally, new tests have been added to validate these changes.

items.title: Standardize Image Task Preview Gaps in Nexior 🎨
items.summary: This update unifies the spacing between image task previews to a consistent 10px across various components, including Flux and QR Art. It aligns with existing styles from Seedream, Nano Banana, and OpenAI Image, ensuring a cohesive look. New tests have been added to verify the spacing adjustments, enhancing overall quality and consistency.

items.title: Refactor image result spacing ownership in Nexior 🎨
items.summary: This update removes implicit ownership of external layout spacing from the `ImageWrapper` component. It explicitly retains the `mb-4` margin in the Midjourney single image result caller, ensuring a consistent spacing contract across various callers including Flux and OpenAI Image. Comprehensive tests confirm the changes maintain layout integrity.

items.title: Enhance Seedream Prompt Spacing in Nexior 🎉
items.summary: This update adds regression coverage for spacing issues related to null prompts in Seedream legacy tasks. It ensures that failed content retains proper spacing regardless of whether the prompt is null, undefined, or an empty string. Additionally, valid prompts do not introduce extra top spacing.

items.title: Enhance Kimi K3 Documentation in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update exposes Kimi K3's `reasoning_effort` values in the request form and OpenAPI contract, improving clarity for users. Additionally, it refreshes the Kimi service introduction to prioritize K3 content while maintaining K2 compatibility. A regression test has been added to ensure the accuracy of the Kimi request/response schema.

items.title: Revamp Airwallex Global Payments Design in Index 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a comprehensive design for Airwallex's global payments and per-order accounts. Key changes include the establishment of a corporate BankTransfer as a unique Global Account per order, removal of the rejected customer-shared account, and detailed documentation on account matching and quota behaviors. These enhancements aim to streamline payment processes and improve operational efficiency.

items.title: Enhance Page Extraction Efficiency in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the page extraction process by binding semantic page discovery to a maximum of 2,000 visited elements and text nodes. It caps synchronous extraction at 1.5 seconds while ensuring useful candidates are retained, and replaces repeated label scans with native associated labels. Additionally, the extension has been released as version 0.6.3, following thorough validation and testing.

items.title: Revamp Agent Integration Guides in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update replaces the outdated per-service Agent JSON validator with a unified compiler, enhancing the integration process. It compiles 20 service sources into localized manifests, ensuring efficient translations and payload management. Key improvements include read-only evidence tooling, CI for guide freshness, and immutable Skill source links, significantly boosting the reliability of Agent integrations.

items.title: Streamline migration by removing duplicate entry in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update removes the duplicate migration file `0229_merge_0228_leaves`, which was unnecessary since the equivalent migration `0229_merge_0228` was already merged. The retained migration continues to depend on the relevant `0228` leaves, ensuring no disruption to the migration process. Validation checks confirm that there are no changes detected post-removal.

items.title: Enhance MongoDB 5 Index Support in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update replaces partial dispatcher indexes with ordinary indexes on the `mountsea_suno_tasks` collection while maintaining the unique public task ID index. A regression guard has been added to prevent unsupported partial filters from returning. The changes ensure compatibility with MongoDB 5.0.12 without affecting the legacy tasks collection.

items.title: Streamline Payment Process by Removing Bank Transfer References in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update removes all references to bank transfers, including the warning, field, and related dependencies. Dead reference keys have been eliminated from all order locales, and support copy has been updated to request only the order ID and wire receipt. The changes enhance the user experience by simplifying the payment process across multiple languages.

items.title: Consolidate Migration Leaves for Efficiency in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update merges two independent migration leaves, `0228_drop_bank_transfer_reference_columns` and `0228_remove_x402_replay`, into a single migration. The merge migration, `0229_merge_0228_leaves`, contains no operations as both migrations are already live. Validation checks confirm no changes were detected, ensuring a smooth integration.

items.title: Enhance WCDB Data Prewarming for Better Performance in Wisdom 🚀
items.summary: This update expands the WCDB preparation process to include warming of self profile, contacts, conversations, moments, and sample messages. It also ensures that structured preparation details are returned from the WCDB worker and that the DB-backed self profile is persisted during runtime preparation, allowing the /api/account endpoint to be populated before readiness. These changes aim to improve the overall efficiency and responsiveness of the application.

items.title: Fix migration graph for concurrent updates in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update merges the `0228_drop_bank_transfer_reference_columns` and `0228_remove_x402_replay` migrations into a new `0229` merge migration. It restores a single migration leaf, allowing new PlatformBackend pods to successfully pass their migrate init container. No schema changes are made, ensuring existing pods remain available during the transition.

items.title: Enable Suno Rollout and Voices in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update isolates the MountSea Suno task and introduces a new `/suno/voices` endpoint, enhancing the integration with OpenAI-HK. Key improvements include preserving provider affinity and enabling router-managed verification for the Suno deployment. The changes also address a startup blocker related to legacy data, ensuring a smoother rollout.

items.title: Enhance Browser Relay Diagnostics in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the logging for Browser Relay notifications by providing privacy-safe reasons for delivery failures. Key changes include hashing call IDs into non-reversible references and preserving fail-closed behavior for malformed Redis epoch values. These enhancements aim to better diagnose silent delivery drops without compromising sensitive information.

items.title: Revamp Agent Integration Guides in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update replaces the hardcoded Agent host UI with a dynamic renderer for backend-compiled manifests. Key enhancements include improved token handling, rendering capabilities, and the removal of legacy components, streamlining the integration process. The changes ensure better support for various app configurations and enhance overall user experience.

items.title: Clean up unused X402Replay model in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update removes the unused `X402Replay` Django model and its public export, ensuring a clean migration history. The migration `0226_x402_replay` is preserved as immutable, while a new migration `0228_remove_x402_replay` is added to physically drop the table. Validation confirms no production references exist, maintaining system integrity.

items.title: Clean Up Obsolete Payment References in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update removes the outdated `Order.bank_reference` and `BankTransferRecord.reference` columns from the database. The migration is designed to run outside of a transaction to ensure that locks are released independently, enhancing performance. Additionally, reverse SQL scripts are provided to restore the original columns if needed.

items.title: Streamline Airwallex Account Allocation per Order in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update replaces the previous customer-shared account design with a required Global Account allocation for each order. Key changes include the removal of conflicting fields and the deletion of prelaunch test data, ensuring a cleaner and more efficient payment process. The migration also includes validation checks and a structured rollout plan to minimize risks during deployment.

items.title: Introducing Suno V2 Adapter for Enhanced Audio Processing in Platform Service 🎉
items.summary: This update adds a MountSea Suno V2 adapter while maintaining existing public routes and response shapes. It implements all 17 `/suno/audios` actions, along with various APIs for lyrics, mashups, and more. Key improvements include durable checkpoints, task recovery, and a dedicated Suno deployment, currently set to zero replicas until rollout gates are approved.

items.title: Streamline Airwallex Payment Process in Pay Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update removes references to Airwallex transfers, simplifying the payment creation process. The changes include reducing the payload to essential fields and ensuring compatibility only with the new structure. All relevant tests have passed, confirming the stability of the modifications.

items.title: Enhance Producer Task Failure Reporting in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the visibility of failed Producer tasks by displaying task-level failure messages when no audio results are generated. Users can now see and copy the task ID, failure reason, and trace ID, while partial results will still be shown if available. Additionally, failure metadata types have been added for 18 locales to enhance user experience.

items.title: Enhance Browser Grant Validation in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the validation of browser capability JWTs by ensuring they match the SHA-256 hash of the exact canonical tool input. It also introduces checks to reject any valid signed grants if the Relay input has been altered. Additionally, the extension package has been updated to version 0.6.2, ensuring all tests passed successfully.

items.title: Enhance Browser Input Hashing for Capability Grants in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new hashing mechanism for bounded browser input prior to requesting capability grants. The Browser Relay now independently hashes the dispatch input before authentication verification, ensuring enhanced security. Compatibility for status and cancel control requests is maintained without hashing, and inputs that cannot be RFC8785 canonicalized will fail closed.

items.title: Enhance Browser Capability Grants in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces an optional input hash for browser capability grants during rolling deployments. The hash is signed into new capability JWTs and enforced by Relay, while legacy support is maintained. Additionally, stale browser capability fixtures have been migrated to canonical connection fields, ensuring a smoother transition.

items.title: Enhance Suno Task Failure Visibility in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a task-level failure fallback for Suno tasks that fail to generate audio. Users will now see the Task ID, failure reason, and Trace ID for failed tasks, ensuring transparency and better debugging. Additionally, partial results with playable audio will remain visible without displaying a failure banner, improving user experience.

items.title: Migrating to Official x402 v2 for Enhanced Performance in x402 🚀
items.summary: This update replaces the legacy facilitator entrypoints with the official x402 v2 Base SDK, ensuring robust transaction handling and state management. Key features include PostgreSQL authorization retention, a manual cutover path, and removal of outdated routes. The deployment process has been thoroughly validated with all tests passing, ensuring a smooth transition to the new system.

items.title: New X402 Replay Ledger Added in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces the `X402Replay` ledger, which enhances the Gateway's capabilities for indexed payment and nonce replay lookups. Key changes include ensuring unique payment digests and nonce keys while treating trace IDs as non-unique. The migration must be executed before deploying the new PlatformGateway image to ensure proper functionality.

items.title: Enhance Fish Task Failure Visibility in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the handling of failed Fish tasks by clearly distinguishing them from pending tasks. It introduces detailed failure information, including the reason, elapsed time, and trace ID for failed TTS tasks. Additionally, localization updates have been made to support these changes across multiple languages.

items.title: Enhance OpenAI Image Task States in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update clarifies the display of OpenAI Image task states by introducing distinct icons and titles for pending and legacy responses. New tasks awaiting a response will show a clock icon with a 'Pending' title, while legacy responses without a success outcome will display an info icon with a 'Status' title. The changes improve user experience by providing clearer feedback on task statuses.

items.title: Streamlined Browser Actions with Continuous Consent in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update enhances the extension by allowing attached tabs to function with continuous consent for browser actions, eliminating the need for per-write approvals. Key changes include the removal of the approval broker and side-panel prompts while maintaining security checks and operational bounds. The legacy approval storage has also been cleared during initialization, ensuring a cleaner user experience.

items.title: Update Flux Task Status to Pending in Nexior ⏳
items.summary: This update changes the status label for Flux tasks awaiting a response from 'Failure' to 'Pending', improving clarity for users. The associated icon has also been updated from a warning to a time icon to reflect this change. Regression tests have been added to ensure that the new 'Pending' status is displayed correctly without affecting other task statuses.

items.title: Revamped Agent Guide Manifest for Enhanced Localization in Index 🚀
items.summary: This update replaces locale-specific guide files with a unified catalog structure, improving localization through a new JSON format. The V2 model introduces an extensible app catalog and tightens runtime contracts, ensuring better performance and reliability. Additionally, extensive validation confirms the integrity of the changes, paving the way for a smoother rollout.

items.title: Enhance bank transfer order handling in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update replaces the unstructured validation for pending bank transfer orders with a structured HTTP 409 response. It includes the existing order ID for better client recovery and maintains user-specific advisory locking and filters. The changes improve the robustness of the payment processing system.

items.title: Enhance Agent Workflows with New Commands in Index 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces three new agent workflow commands: a resumable release closure workflow, a cross-repository capability shipping workflow, and a provider route audit workflow. These enhancements aim to streamline processes for PR management, deployment, and auditing, ensuring better tracking and resolution of issues. All commands have been registered in the AGENTS.md intent router for easy access.

items.title: Enhance nano-banana with --count option for image commands in Clis 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new `--count` option to the `generate` and `edit` commands in the nano-banana CLI, allowing users to specify the number of images to process (1-4). The feature enhances flexibility in image generation and editing requests. Additionally, tests have been added to ensure proper functionality and validation of the new parameter.

items.title: Enhance Pixverse Error Display in Nexior 🚨
items.summary: This update modifies the styling for failed Pixverse tasks, changing the alert from 'info' to 'failure' to better highlight errors. Additionally, regression tests have been added to ensure that failed tasks consistently use the 'failure' class. The overall layout and display of successful tasks remain unchanged.

items.title: Enhance Native Image Billing by Count in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new billing mechanism for Native images, allowing charges based on the actual count of images requested, ranging from 1 to 4. Key changes include modifications to the response contract, scaling of unit prices during authentication, and improved documentation on partial success behavior. The rollout process is clearly defined to ensure a smooth transition without misbilling.

items.title: Enhance Native Multi-Image Support in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces support for Native multi-image output in the BananaRouter and other workers, allowing for a count of 1-4 images per request. It includes improvements to concurrency handling and billing processes, ensuring accurate billing for successful image generations. The feature is initially disabled by default to facilitate a controlled rollout.

items.title: Enhance Skill Tarball Fetching in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the fetching of Skill repository tarballs by ensuring they are retrieved using the resolved commit SHA. It addresses issues with metadata consistency when the main branch changes during requests and adds regression tests for URL pinning and SHA propagation. The changes enhance reliability and accuracy in syncing skills.

items.title: Enhance Bank Transfer Option Visibility in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a targeted bank transfer option that appears only when the low amount test flag is enabled. The UI now features a shared organization icon in the selector and order summary, replacing the previous blank icon. Key validations have passed, ensuring a smooth integration with the backend.

items.title: Completed MountSea Suno V2 Audit in Index 🚀
items.summary: The audit of all public Suno paths and audio actions against MountSea V2 has been successfully completed. Key findings include the successful integration of 17 audio actions and the identification of a functional blocker in the `/suno/voices` endpoint. Compatibility classifications have been corrected, ensuring that internal compositions remain unchanged while meeting external schema requirements.

items.title: Enhance Nexior Scenario Spacing Consistency in Index 🎨
items.summary: This update introduces a comprehensive 629-line audit for 22 Nexior generation and workflow scenarios, focusing on spacing consistency. Key changes include a visual legend for status markers, detailed scorecards, and defined ownership for spacing. The findings highlight areas of compliance and exceptions, paving the way for improved layout and task-state management.

items.title: Enhance Low-Value Bank Transfer Testing in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a targeted low-value bank transfer testing feature, allowing a minimum transfer amount of USD 5 when the `ENABLE_BANK_TRANSFER_LOW_AMOUNT_TEST` flag is active. The standard minimum remains at USD 5,000, ensuring compliance with existing authentication and verification processes. Key files modified include the order handling logic and settings for the new test threshold.

items.title: Enhance Metric Preservation in Skills 📊
items.summary: This update ensures that labeled engagement values using ASCII or full-width colons are preserved, while unlabeled profile counters are retained separately. All provider-specific behaviors are maintained within the Xiaohongshu Skill package. The changes have passed all relevant tests, confirming their stability and functionality.

items.title: Enhance Xiaohongshu Note Parsing in Skills 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces deterministic parsers for note-detail and profile snapshots in Xiaohongshu. Key improvements include the preservation of canonical URLs and handling of ambiguous author states, along with the addition of new read workflow commands and sanitized fixtures. The changes have been validated with successful unit and integration tests.

items.title: Revamped Agent Guide Manifest V2 in Index 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces the Agent Integration Guide Manifest V2, enhancing the existing Service.agent and Document.agent configurations without requiring new database models. Key changes include the consolidation of metadata and command templates into the PlatformBackend agent configuration, and the transition of the PlatformFrontend to a more versatile rendering system. The V1 core has been marked as shipped, paving the way for improved operational efficiency.

items.title: Enhance Xiaohongshu Parsing Capabilities in Skills 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces deterministic parsers for Xiaohongshu note-detail and profile snapshots, allowing for better handling of structured fields. It includes the normalization of note and profile URLs, and ensures that only explicitly labeled metrics and comments are processed. Additionally, new sanitized fixtures have been added to improve testing accuracy.

items.title: Enhanced Media Field Spacing in Nexior 🎉
items.summary: This update improves the vertical spacing around media fields in Seedance, Kling, and Midjourney components. Key adjustments include increasing the margin around reference images, audio, and video fields to enhance usability and visual clarity. All upload buttons and controls maintain their original sizing, ensuring a consistent user experience.

items.title: Streamline Balance Provider Credentials Management in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update removes hardcoded provider credentials from `balance.py`, standardizing the naming convention for balance runtime names. It integrates the balance CronJob with existing Kubernetes Secrets and introduces dedicated `BALANCE_API_TOKEN` keys for specific providers. Additionally, it enhances error handling by allowing optional credentials to be skipped without interrupting checks, improving overall reliability.

items.title: Enhance Xiaohongshu Skill with Local Workflows in Skills 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a refined structure for the Xiaohongshu skill, encapsulating all provider-specific behavior within the Skill package. Key changes include the addition of various references for login, browsing, publishing, and interactions, along with a contract helper for validation. Comprehensive tests have been implemented to ensure robustness against unsafe inputs and other edge cases.

items.title: Enhance Suno Variation and Seedance Spacing in Nexior 🎨
items.summary: This update restores the implementation to a fresh baseline while refining the Suno Advanced Parameters by enlarging the Variation Type. Additionally, it improves the layout of Seedance frame fields, providing more height and space for the First and Last Frame Image title rows. Overall, these changes enhance usability without altering existing components.

items.title: Streamline Agent Guide Scopes in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update simplifies the Agent guide by removing the local/device install scope, now only displaying project/user scopes. It also replaces generic MCP/Custom host entries with specific OpenClaw and Hermes options when applicable. Additionally, PowerShell-specific setup for Claude MCP is generated when Windows is selected, enhancing user experience.

items.title: Align Seedream Spacing with Nano Banana in Nexior 🎨
items.summary: This update restores the Seedream task spacing to match Nano Banana's 10px and ensures the containment properties are consistent. Additionally, it introduces a 15px margin above the failure panel when there is no rendered prompt. Regression tests have been added to cover various prompt scenarios, ensuring stability and alignment across components.

items.title: Revamp MountSea Balance Monitoring in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update replaces the deprecated MountSea JWT flow with the new API-key endpoint for balance checks. It introduces a graceful fallback mechanism when the API key is unavailable and enhances the response reporting with explicit status messages. Additionally, focused tests have been added to ensure the integrity of the new implementation.

items.title: Manual Deployment Required for FacilitatorX402 in x402 🚀
items.summary: This update stops automatic deployments of FacilitatorX402 on every push to the main branch. Instead, it introduces a manual deployment process using `workflow_dispatch`, ensuring that only the main branch can trigger deployments. Existing pull-request CI and currently running production pods remain unaffected.

items.title: Enhanced Agent Integration Guide in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update refines the Agent Integration Guide by renaming the right-rail workbench and improving the layout of API code blocks. Key changes include the addition of a markdown-style guide, full-width source buttons, and adjustments to the MCP/Skill install dimensions. These enhancements aim to provide a clearer and more user-friendly experience for developers.
